mapper.select: SELECT * FROM calendar_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND start_dt <= LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AND end_dt >= TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY start_dt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar_schedule ( user_id, schedule_type, schedule_title, schedule_cont, start_dt, end_dt, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{scheduleType}, #{scheduleTitle}, #{scheduleCont}, #{startDt}, #{endDt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE calendar_schedule SET schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, schedule_title = #{scheduleTitle}, schedule_cont = #{scheduleCont}, start_dt = #{startDt}, end_dt = #{endDt}, mdfcn_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE schedule_sn = #{scheduleSn} AND user_id = #{userId}
